name: Cheddar Pancakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Set out a heavy skillet.
2. Put the grated Cheddar cheese in a bowl and add the sour cream and egg yolks, mixing well after each addition.
3. In a separate bowl or cup, mix together 1 tablespoon flour, salt, dried thyme, and dry mustard.
4. Melt the butter in the skillet over low heat.
5. Drop spoonfuls of batter into the skillet.
6. Cook until lightly browned on the bottom.
7. Loosen the edges with a spatula, turn, and cook until lightly browned on the other side.
8. Serve immediately with bacon or pork sausage.
9. Makes about 2 dozen 3-inch cakes.
